ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or summary of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the movie */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of votes for the movie */,
  "adult" INTEGER /* Whether the movie is for adults only */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the movie is considered successful */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* A short, catchy phrase that summarizes the movie */,
  "poster_path" TEXT /* The path to the movie poster image */,
  "backdrop_path" TEXT /* The path to the movie backdrop image */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the movie */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* The official website of the movie */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* The IMDb ID of the movie */,
  "tmdb_id" INTEGER /* The TMDB ID of the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* The URL to the movie trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "logo_path" TEXT /* Logo path of the production company */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Origin country of the production company */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the production company */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-production company relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_companies_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_companies_production_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_639_1" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_languages" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-language relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_languages_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* The path to the user's profile picture */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The date of birth of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* A text review written by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie in the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the watchlist entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the watchlist entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
